summary: Iteration 86 - Cashfree Orders API (Hosted Checkout) Testing Complete. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend payment status pages verified. LIVE PRODUCTION payment orders are being created successfully with real Cashfree payment URLs.
critical_code_review_comments: Cashfree Orders API implementation is production-ready and working
Payment URLs are generated correctly pointing to payments.cashfree.com
Website order endpoint auto-creates leads correctly
Dashboard stats endpoint returns comprehensive statistics
Webhook endpoint is accessible and handles events properly
All payment status pages (success/failed/pending) render correctly with proper branding
seed_data_creation: Created test orders via API: ASR202604090224236828FA, ASR20260409022424992580
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cashfree Orders API (Hosted Checkout) is fully working in PRODUCTION. The previous Payment Links API was blocked but the Orders API bypasses that limitation. Orders are created successfully and return real Cashfree payment URLs at payments.cashfree.com. All endpoints tested: /api/cashfree/config, /api/cashfree/create-order, /api/cashfree/website/create-order, /api/cashfree/order/{id}, /api/cashfree/order/{id}/refresh, /api/cashfree/dashboard/stats, /api/cashfree/orders, /api/cashfree/lead/{id}/orders, /api/cashfree/webhook.

features_verified.GET /api/cashfree/config: WORKING - Returns environment=PRODUCTION, api_mode=orders_api, correct support info
features_verified.POST /api/cashfree/create-order: WORKING - Creates LIVE payment orders with real Cashfree payment URLs
features_verified.POST /api/cashfree/website/create-order: WORKING - Creates orders and auto-creates leads
features_verified.GET /api/cashfree/order/{order_id}: WORKING - Returns order details from local DB
features_verified.GET /api/cashfree/order/{order_id}/refre: WORKING - Fetches status from Cashfree API
features_verified.GET /api/cashfree/dashboard/stats: WORKING - Returns overview, today, this_week, this_month, by_status, by_payment_type
features_verified.GET /api/cashfree/orders: WORKING - Returns paginated list with filtering support
features_verified.GET /api/cashfree/lead/{lead_id}/orders: WORKING - Returns orders for specific lead
features_verified.Payment Success Page (/payment/success): WORKING - Shows order details, WhatsApp button, Call button, support info
features_verified.Payment Failed Page (/payment/failed): WORKING - Shows error reason, tips, retry option, support info
features_verified.Payment Pending Page (/payment/pending): WORKING - Shows auto-refresh, check status button, support info
features_verified.Support phone 9296389097: VERIFIED - Displayed correctly on all payment pages

cashfree_integration_notes.solution: Using Orders API (Hosted Checkout) instead of Payment Links API
